description: Send desktop notifications when Claude Code finishes working or needs user input. Works on macOS and Linux systems.

hooks.command: if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished working" with title "Claude Code"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send 'Claude Code' "Claude has finished working"; fi

if command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'; elif command -v notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1; then notify-send -u critical 'Claude Code' "Claude needs your input"; fi
